# services.dnsmasq

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.dnsmasq`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.dnsmasq.alwaysKeepRunning` | `boolean` | If enabled, systemd will always respawn dnsmasq even if shut down manually. The default, disabled, will only restart it on error. |
| `services.dnsmasq.configFile` | `package` | Path to the configuration file of dnsmasq. |
| `services.dnsmasq.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to run dnsmasq. |
| `services.dnsmasq.package` | `package` | The dnsmasq package to use. |
| `services.dnsmasq.resolveLocalQueries` | `boolean` | Whether dnsmasq should resolve local queries (i.e. add 127.0.0.1 to /etc/resolv.conf). |
| `services.dnsmasq.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a list of them for duplicate keys)` | Configuration of dnsmasq. Lists get added one value per line (empty lists and false values don't get added, though false values get turned to comments). Gets merged with { dhcp-leasefile = "/var/lib/dnsmasq/dnsmasq.leases"; conf-file = optional cfg.resolveLocalQueries "/etc/dnsmasq-conf.conf"; resolv-file = optional cfg.resolveLocalQueries "/etc/dnsmasq-resolv.conf"; } |
| `services.dnsmasq.settings.server` | `list of string` | The DNS servers which dnsmasq should query. |
